enforcement: verify_dynamic_admission.py is normative; closed-world records reject duplicate/non-finite/secret/model-content fields, with monetary telemetry parsed only where its sealed producer emits JSON numbers
decimal_encoding: dynamic policy and authorization money uses finite nonnegative canonical decimal strings; sealed arm-gate/proxy telemetry may use finite JSON numbers parsed as Decimal, then is range-checked and byte-recomputed from sealed producers

checks: capture_tool_sha256 equals the sealed capture tool
0 <= authorization_time - observed_at_utc <= 900 seconds
abs(limit - usage - remaining) <= 0.000000001 USD
remaining covers every unspent fuse
usage plus every unspent fuse is no more than USD 250
before V7 usage is no lower than immutable post-R4 historical usage USD 122.284488918
before V13 usage and timestamp are monotonic and provider delta equals exact V7 ledger cost
raw byte length and SHA-256 match the sealed XML file
parser_sha256 equals the sealed dynamic admission verifier
XML has no DTD or entity declarations
XML has exactly one dated Cube and exactly one USD quote within it
reference date is Monday-Friday, nonfuture, and 0-7 UTC calendar days old
capture is no more than 900 seconds old and not future-dated
USD-per-EUR is a finite positive decimal

campaign_gate.builder_command: python -I -S -B verify_dynamic_admission.py build-campaign-audit --repository-root ROOT --requirements REQUIREMENTS --output DECLARED_OUTPUT
checks: campaign declaration, frozen auditor, and its sole benchmark-history support module hashes match the replacement precommit
the sole campaign-audit builder permits only the three distinct precommitted output paths and refuses overwrite

the builder loads the exact hash-bound history and auditor source files as synthetic package modules under isolated Python -I -S -B with no bytecode writes, user site, startup hooks, or inherited PYTHONPATH
fresh auditor stdout parses as canonical content-free JSON before immutable creation
phase-specific stored audit is byte-identical to a current frozen-auditor recomputation
complete is true and unknown cost and invalid completion identity counts are zero
V7 and V13 ledger paths are exactly the two declaration entries
before V7 both ledgers have their distinct exact blank hashes and zero events
before V13 the V7 ledger and its direct identity audit hashes match while V13 remains exact blank
baseline plus actual admitted ledgers plus every unspent fuse is no more than USD 250
each predecessor staged manifest path is exactly beside its declared staged prediction directory and its bytes match the sealed SHA-256
each staged manifest is closed-schema canonical input with the exact project, 42-question scope, question-ID hash, checks, ordered file paths, byte counts, and file hashes
the staged manifest recorded evaluated-directory suffix identifies the exact portable repository-relative staged source path
both actual staged source trees exactly match their manifests before every authorization, with no missing files, extra files, extra directories, symlinks, hardlinks, or other nonregular entries
each fresh working-copy manifest has an exactly equal files list to its sealed staged manifest and names the exact staged and working directories
the current working source tree is re-read against that list immediately before authorization

runtime_source_gate.archive_policy: exact hash-bound tar/tar.gz inputs; at most 1000 members, 64 MiB expanded, 16 MiB per member
checks: both archives reject absolute paths, parent traversal, noncanonical or duplicate member names, symlinks, hardlinks, sparse files, devices, FIFOs, and every type except regular file or directory
the exact extracted v11-source and harness-source roots contain the same files and directories as their archives with byte-identical size and SHA-256
extracted roots reject missing, extra, symlinked, hardlinked, and nonregular entries and are recursively read-only before authorization
vendor Python is an exact sealed symlink whose textual target, canonical resolved path, executable bytes, pyvenv.cfg, prefix/base-prefix, version, and cache tag all match the precommit

the exact base stdlib and vendor site-packages trees are sealed by canonical directory and file records, counts, total bytes, and aggregate SHA-256; the attempt-local site-packages copy is recursively read-only
the wrapper launches the harness through the sealed guard under -I -S -B; site-packages is inserted manually so executable .pth files and sitecustomize never run
the guard disables both dotenv.load_dotenv entry points before evaluator import, asserts exact harness module provenance/signatures, and fixes the only route to http://127.0.0.1:8890/v1
the proxy and harness run under explicit clean environments; proxy bypass is NO_PROXY=* and harness localhost bypass is NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost
the proxy runtime is an exact sealed copy of the live hardened proxy and runs through its hash-checking synthetic-package guard
all verifier, guard, proxy, telemetry, and harness Python actions use the same hash-bound vendor interpreter
proxy SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown is graceful, drained, exit-zero, releases port 8890, and emits the terminal stopped record
evaluator stdout/stderr is embargoed in an immutable log and never streamed before score release
runtime_source_gate.portability_note: the vendor environment aggregate is an exact platform-specific execution binding; independent reproduction must recreate the sealed CPython/site-packages inventory or publish a separately audited equivalent environment

checks: the whole document equals a fresh closed-world recomputation
the published replacement-precommit SHA equals SHA256(replacement SHA256SUMS)
both sealed staged manifests, staged source trees, fresh working-copy manifests, runtime archives/extractions, and vendor environment are hash-bound; the current variant is pristine
the exact phase-to-run-root/project/dataset argument tuple matches
authorized is true only when every campaign, provider, EUR, ledger, and working-copy check passes
before V13 binds byte-recomputed V7 arm gate, exact completed status, proxy stop log, proxy health, and exact-ledger fuse
prior-arm evidence is absent before V7 and mandatory before V13

independent_audit_v1.binding: SHA-256 of the exact authorization bytes, requirements, replacement precommit, verifier, every dynamic artifact, runtime archive/environment identities, both staged/working manifests, and both ledgers
independent_audit_v1.checks: a separate build-audit invocation recomputes every gate; the wrapper recomputes both documents again immediately before the proxy

checks: both complete pre-call authorizations are exactly reconstructed at their recorded timestamps and argument tuples from their phase-time ledger bytes and mirrored frozen campaign-auditor replay; both independent audits must equal exact closed documents around those authorizations

every immutable artifact named by both phase authorizations is reopened and recomputed before score release, including phase campaign/provider/FX evidence, runtime/environment evidence, and both staged/working manifests
the before-V7 provider telemetry bytes still match both phase authorizations
both complete evaluator ledgers pass the sealed direct identity verifier
the immutable final campaign audit is byte-identical to a current frozen-auditor recomputation
final campaign spend equals frozen baseline plus the exact two evaluator ledgers
post-pair provider usage delta from the authorization-bound before-V7 telemetry equals the exact sum of both ledgers
provider usage and campaign spend remain within USD 250
fresh ECB evidence, 1000-basis-point buffer, max campaign/provider USD basis, and upward-cent rounding remain within EUR 300
an immutable independent final-spend audit binds every source hash

both V7 and V13 score-blind arm gates, completed statuses, proxy stop logs, proxy health records, and exact per-arm ledger fuses are freshly recomputed and hash-bound before score_release_authorized can be true
the builder permits only the exact precommitted paired-result path, creates a new 0444 file, and refuses overwrite
the same invocation freshly reruns final spend authorization/audit verification against all current preserved evidence

both immutable evaluation audits must be byte-identical to isolated recomputation by attempt1/tools/v11-source/narratordb/benchmarks/evaluation_audit.py from the exact immutable scored tree, sealed frozen tree, question scope, evaluator log, and identity-audited usage ledger

each exact completed attempt-status document, scored-tree inventory, evaluator log, usage ledger, evaluation auditor, and evaluation audit is SHA-256 bound to its own variant so audits cannot be fabricated or swapped
all validation arrays, terminal failure maps, upstream error counts, unknown-cost counts, and invalid-identity counts are zero
overall and by-question-type correct/total/accuracy arithmetic reconciles exactly to denominator 42

the result embeds both exact evaluation-audit and per-variant evidence SHA-256 maps, the canonical fresh final-verification SHA-256, final-spend authorization SHA-256, and replacement precommit SHA-256

eur_formula.governance_basis_usd: max(fresh campaign observed USD + unspent fuses, fresh provider usage USD + unspent fuses)

checks: copy provider credential to a non-exported shell variable and unset OPENROUTER_API_KEY before any command substitution or external child
ignore BASH_ENV and imported functions through privileged direct Bash startup
forbid external env KEY=value launchers and credential-bearing argument vectors
resolve every credential target from the verified absolute repository root
bind launcher and wrapper paths and SHA-256 values in dynamic requirements
inject the key separately for each exact credential action and unset it first in every noncredential command
verify the exact vendor interpreter target and bytes while the credential remains non-exported
telemetry-before-V13 reruns the sealed V7 preaction gate with port 8890 unused before exporting the credential
telemetry-after-pair reruns the sealed V13 preaction gate with port 8890 unused before exporting the credential
gate path is derived exactly as VARIANT_RUN_ROOT/evaluation/arm-gate.json
sealed guard byte-recomputes the gate from immutable scored tree, frozen tree, question IDs, evaluator log, and usage ledger
authorization/completeness/scope booleans pass, failures and all validation arrays are empty, and every validation count is exact integer zero
request-model and provider maps are subsets of the frozen GLM/DeepSeek and route-order allowlists
gate telemetry cost is finite/nonnegative/no more than USD 2.50 and the exact Decimal ledger total independently remains no more than USD 2.50
recursive score/content keys are forbidden and correctness numerators never authorize another action
attempt status is immutable exact completed/exit0 and its hash is bound
proxy start/stop log has exactly two JSON records, zero reserved cost, matching usage; initial health and both hashes are bound
gate, status, ledger audit, ledger, proxy log, health, evaluator log, and scored tree are read-only, single-link evidence
